title: Visual Template AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: structured visual template built around adult ceramicist shaping a porcelain vase beside shelves of handmade vessels. Subject: adult ceramicist shaping a porcelain vase beside shelves of handmade vessels is the central visual idea, supported by porcelain vase, clay tools, glaze bowls, pinned sketches, linen towel, and handmade labels as readable concrete details. Scene: sunlit artisan studio with wooden table, clay tools, drying shelves, linen apron, and soft dust in the air provides the environment and spatial context with clean depth and organized props. Composition: Fixed poster or template composition with clear hierarchy, stable layout, readable focal point, and enough spacing for text if needed. Style: Polished visual-template finish with strong layout clarity, clean object detail, modern presentation quality, and reusable content structure. Color Palette: Unified palette chosen to support the subject, clean contrast, readable details, and a premium finished image. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: STUDIO NOTES appears only as short intentional text, legible and integrated into the design. Signature Elements: adult ceramicist shaping a porcelain vase beside shelves of handmade vessels, sunlit artisan studio with wooden table, clay tools, drying shelves, linen apron, and soft dust in the air, STUDIO NOTES, and porcelain vase, clay tools, glaze bowls, pinned sketches, linen towel, and handmade labels define the reusable visual-template mechanism. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Visual Template Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: structured visual template built around adult botanist arranging rare orchids beside a glass greenhouse worktable. Subject: adult botanist arranging rare orchids beside a glass greenhouse worktable is the central visual idea, supported by orchid stems, glass cloche, handwritten tags, pruning scissors, soil tray, and field notebook as readable concrete details. Scene: misty greenhouse with metal frames, condensation, plant labels, terracotta pots, and filtered morning light provides the environment and spatial context with clean depth and organized props. Composition: Fixed poster or template composition with clear hierarchy, stable layout, readable focal point, and enough spacing for text if needed. Style: Polished visual-template finish with strong layout clarity, clean object detail, modern presentation quality, and reusable content structure. Color Palette: Unified palette chosen to support the subject, clean contrast, readable details, and a premium finished image. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: BOTANY CLUB appears only as short intentional text, legible and integrated into the design. Signature Elements: adult botanist arranging rare orchids beside a glass greenhouse worktable, misty greenhouse with metal frames, condensation, plant labels, terracotta pots, and filtered morning light, BOTANY CLUB, and orchid stems, glass cloche, handwritten tags, pruning scissors, soil tray, and field notebook define the reusable visual-template mechanism. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.
